plugin.name: Apex
plugin.description: OneXPlayer Apex device fixes: recover the internal gamepad when its xHCI controller dies on resume — manually or automatically on every wake (or blacklist the hid-oxp driver to prevent the drop-out), block the fingerprint reader from waking the device on a light touch, and detect & mount a second internal SSD holding a Steam library when an update stops auto-mounting it.
plugin.subtitle: OneXPlayer Apex fixes
